entries.heading: Modular Consoles – Migration Required
entries.short_description: The original Modular Consoles mod is broken on the current game version. Migrate to the maintained community version.
entries.long_description:
The original author is currently unavailable and the mod no longer works correctly on recent updates (especially the beta branch).

We recommend switching to the community-maintained version provided by StationeersCommunityMods.

Clicking the button below will automatically add the Manifest repo and install the replacement. You will also need to add LibConstruct from the same repo for full functionality (you can do this with: slp repomods add LibConstruct).
